description.ko: 수정 프리즘을 통과하는 빛이 선명한 기하학적 반사와 함께 활기찬 무지개색 스펙트럼으로 분산되는 추상적인 탐구입니다.
description.en: An abstract exploration of light passing through a crystalline prism, dispersing into a vibrant spectrum of colors with sharp geometric reflections.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of a glass prism on a dark minimalist background, light beam hitting the edge, sharp light refraction, caustic patterns, rainbow dispersion, 8k resolution, ray tracing, translucent textures, prismatic glow.
